description: Minimal Pixi-only visual catalog for Panel2Reels. This replaces the experimental legacy catalog in product flows.

visualCategories.name: Manga / Action / Shonen
visualCategories.description: High-energy manga, fight beats, speed, impact, slash, aura and action punctuation.

visualCategories.name: Webtoon / Manhwa / Vertical Flow
visualCategories.description: Mobile-native vertical reading, scroll reveals, floating panels, drama zooms and long-page rhythm.

visualCategories.name: Camera / Motion / Universal
visualCategories.description: Movement-only presets for comic reels: push-ins, snap zooms, whip pans, tilted tension, parallax, drops and scan reveals without decorative overlays.

visualCategories.name: Romance / Fantasy / Soft Magic
visualCategories.description: Confession, emotion, beauty beats, petals, glow, fantasy wonder and soft dramatic reveals.

visualCategories.name: Horror / Thriller / Suspense
visualCategories.description: Dread, warnings, glitch fear, darkness, red flashes, jumpscare rhythm and psychological tension.

visualCategories.name: Sci-Fi / Cyberpunk / Tech
visualCategories.description: HUD overlays, holograms, scans, mecha, signal corruption, cyberpunk and tactical analysis.

visualCategories.name: Comic / Superhero / Pop
visualCategories.description: American comic energy, halftone, pop cards, lightning, superhero entrances and bold print texture.

visualCategories.name: Noir / Mystery / Detective
visualCategories.description: Case files, rain, investigation, newspaper, clue reveals, restrained editorial motion and pulp tension.

visualCategories.name: Comedy / Slice of Life / Kids
visualCategories.description: Bounce, sticker, wobble, cute pop, light jokes, school beats and casual creator-friendly moments.

visualCategories.name: Promo / Trailer / Social CTA
visualCategories.description: Hooks, title cards, release banners, shop prompts, cover reveal, countdown and short-form conversion moments.

visualCategories.name: Universal / Editorial / Clean
visualCategories.description: Safe defaults that work over almost any comic art: readable captions, panel zooms, clean cuts and neutral framing.

presets.name: Speed Line Chase
presets.englishDescription: High-speed manga chase effect: directional speed-line fields, edge pressure, impact rhythm and readable action framing without owning the camera motion.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for chases, attacks, sprint beats, evasions, speed reveals and any shonen panel that needs forward momentum without changing panels.

presets.name: Manga Burst Focus Frame
presets.englishDescription: High-contrast black-and-white manga burst frame with dense radial speed lines and a clean center focus, based on classic action-page impact backgrounds.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for impact reveals, power moments, shock beats, attack anticipation and manga panels that need strong radial energy without covering the focal subject.
presets.spanishDescription: Rafaga manga en blanco y negro mas marcada: lineas radiales densas desde los bordes con centro limpio para impacto, revelacion o golpe de energia.

presets.name: Manga Halftone Burst
presets.englishDescription: Radial manga halftone texture: dot-screen burst with a soft center opening and restrained speed rays for print-style impact.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for manga print texture, impact punctuation, emotional shock, pop emphasis and scenes where a dot-screen burst fits better than hard speed lines.
presets.spanishDescription: Trama halftone radial tipo manga: puntos que abren el foco central con rayos suaves para impacto de imprenta.

presets.name: Impact Freeze Punch
presets.englishDescription: Freezes the strike moment with angular pressure, flash snap, fracture detail and a brief hold before the action releases.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for punches, kicks, collision beats, shield hits, power clashes and any single hard impact that needs a dramatic stop-frame.

presets.name: Slash Energy Cut
presets.englishDescription: Draws controlled diagonal sword-cut energy across the active panel with a bright leading edge, trailing sparks and brief exposure lift.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for sword attacks, claw swipes, diagonal action beats, samurai moments, anime weapon reveals and sharp visual punctuation.

presets.name: Power Aura Burst
presets.englishDescription: Builds a character power-up with layered aura glow, rising particles, heat shimmer, pulsing rim light and energy strokes.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for transformations, power reveals, magic charge, rage mode, final attack buildup and any panel where energy must feel alive.

presets.name: Manga SFX Slam
presets.englishDescription: Adds a bold comic sound-effect hit as part of the active panel: scale snap, ink shadow, vibration and short-lived impact flash.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for BAM, WHAM, crash, explosion, scream, hit punctuation and short action words that should become part of the visual beat.

presets.name: Eye Shock Zoom
presets.englishDescription: Punches into a face, eye or critical detail with a shock crop, iris-like framing, ink pulse and short tension hold.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for realization beats, eye closeups, villain reveals, fear before impact, plot twists and sudden recognition moments.

presets.name: Afterimage Dash
presets.englishDescription: Creates fast motion with panel echo silhouettes, lateral smear, staggered ghost frames and speed haze that can sit over a camera move.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for dashes, dodges, teleport-like movement, fast fighters, ninja beats, chase evasion and characters moving faster than the eye.

presets.name: Ink Flash Impact
presets.englishDescription: Uses a black-and-white ink flash, exposure inversion, brush texture and snap-back to create dramatic manga punctuation.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for hard realizations, attack reveals, betrayal beats, manga shock panels, dramatic silence and black-white impact punctuation.

presets.name: Panel Smash Burst
presets.englishDescription: Makes the active panel feel like it breaks its own frame with border cracks, burst shards, pressure lines and displaced panel pieces.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for attacks breaking the frame, monsters bursting out, superhero/shonen entrances, climactic reveals and fourth-wall impact beats.

presets.name: Final Attack Trailer Card
presets.englishDescription: Turns a panel into a final-attack trailer beat with cinematic hold, title pressure, charging light, particles and a release flash.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for final moves, chapter climax, boss fight peak, release teasers, trailer hooks and high-stakes action promotion.

presets.name: Clash Spark Lock
presets.englishDescription: Two opposing attack forces lock across the active panel with blade-like light, black pressure wedges and sharp sparks at the collision line.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for sword clashes, blocked attacks, rival face-offs, shield impacts, weapon locks and dramatic mid-fight pauses where forces meet.

presets.name: Ground Break Impact
presets.englishDescription: A lower-frame impact effect with cracked floor geometry, dust wake, debris and heavy pressure from below instead of a central burst.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for landings, stomp impacts, heavy punches into the ground, giant monster steps, arena breaks and power hitting the floor.

presets.name: Projectile Barrage Rush
presets.englishDescription: A layered barrage of diagonal projectile streaks with varied depth, glowing tips, debris and fast attack rhythm while the panel remains readable.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for arrows, bullets, energy bolts, thrown knives, magic shots, ranged attacks and chaotic attack sequences inside one panel.

presets.name: Energy Beam Sweep
presets.englishDescription: A cinematic beam crosses the panel with hot core light, soft bloom, heat distortion and trailing scan haze without becoming a simple circle burst.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for laser attacks, kamehameha-like beams, magic blasts, mecha weapons, boss attacks and power release moments.

presets.name: Weapon Draw Glint
presets.englishDescription: A restrained weapon-draw beat: thin blade glint, cinematic black mats, sparks and a controlled diagonal shimmer for premium tension.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for sword draw, gun raise, knife reveal, samurai pause, assassin beat and elegant pre-attack tension.

presets.name: Combo Hit Rhythm
presets.englishDescription: Three timed hit accents land in different parts of the panel with comic plates, pressure marks and short flash rhythm for combo sequences.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for multi-hit attacks, punches in sequence, fighting-game beats, rapid impacts, training montages and action rhythm.

presets.name: Shadow Clone Rush
presets.englishDescription: Staggered dark and bright panel silhouettes rush across the frame like clone afterimages, with sliced masks and directional ink speed.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for ninja movement, dashes, teleport feints, speed fighters, clone attacks, evasions and fast character motion.

presets.name: Battle Dust Wake
presets.englishDescription: A grounded action atmosphere with dust plumes, low debris, air streaks and bottom-frame wake that implies movement without covering faces.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for running, landings, arena dust, street fights, chase scenes, battlefield movement and action panels that need physical energy.

presets.name: Rage Pressure Lines
presets.englishDescription: A vertical pressure field for rage or power escalation: jagged ink lines, red-black grading, heat shimmer and restrained tremor.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for rage mode, villain pressure, intimidation, aura buildup, emotional outburst, pre-fight stare and menace without a circular burst.

presets.name: Finisher Impact Frame
presets.englishDescription: A final-hit frame treatment with high contrast shutters, angular white exposure, black ink blocks and a controlled posterized climax flash.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for final hits, decisive attacks, chapter climax, boss defeat, KO frames, trailer ending beats and ultimate move punctuation.

presets.name: Manga Cut Panel Camera
presets.englishDescription: Manga camera cutting with real masked image panels, thick black gutters, white paper rims and staggered editorial timing inspired by action-page layouts.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use as a camera/motion preset for manga panel cuts, Kill Bill-style editorial slicing, suspense beats, chase moments and action reveals while leaving room for a separate FX layer.
presets.spanishDescription: Camara de cortes manga: recorta la imagen en paneles reales con gutters negros, bordes blancos y ritmo editorial tipo pagina de accion.

presets.name: Manga Panel Board Camera
presets.englishDescription: Manga page-board camera: splits the same image into several masked page panels with thick comic gutters and clean white rims.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use when a single image should feel like a manga page layout or multi-panel camera board, especially for comparisons, action beats, reveals and visual rhythm without SFX stickers.
presets.spanishDescription: Camara tipo pagina manga: divide la imagen en varios paneles recortados con gutters gruesos y bordes blancos limpios.

presets.name: Camera Slow Push-In
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: slowly pushes into the same panel with restrained manga editorial tension and no decorative overlay.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for serious dialogue, inner monologue, quiet threat, emotional build, character focus and panels where the art must stay clean.

presets.name: Camera Snap Zoom
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: snaps into the panel with a short recoil, useful for reveals without drawing extra graphics over the art.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for sudden realization, face reveal, important object, villain look, joke beat, threat reveal and quick manga emphasis.

presets.name: Camera Whip Pan
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: whips laterally across the panel with motion blur energy while keeping the image as the main visual.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for chase beats, action direction, quick camera move, fast reveal, movement inside a panel and dynamic reels with minimal overlay.

presets.name: Camera Dutch Drift
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: slow tilted drift with subtle unease, designed for suspense, noir, horror-lite and dramatic manga panels.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for mystery, unsettling dialogue, hidden threat, noir tension, unstable emotions and scenes that need movement without effects.

presets.name: Camera Vertical Scan
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: scans vertically through a page or tall panel with clean mobile reading rhythm and no decorative overlay.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for webtoon-like reading, tall panels, body-to-face reveals, environment reveals and vertical comic pages in reels.

presets.name: Camera Crash Punch-In
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: a fast punch-in with recoil and short shake for impact beats without extra graphics.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for hit beats, punchlines, sudden threats, strong hooks, action panels and energetic reveals when overlays would cover the art.

presets.name: Camera Hero Rise
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: rises from lower framing into a heroic push, good for reveals and power poses.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for protagonist entrance, heroic reveal, final stance, power pose, comeback beat and aspirational character shots.

presets.name: Camera Cliffhanger Drop
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: drops down through the panel with a tense end hold for cliffhangers and final reveals.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for ending hooks, ominous reveals, last-panel drops, emotional fall, suspense endings and reels that need a final hold.

presets.name: Camera Floating Parallax
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: soft floating parallax with gentle push and drift for romance, fantasy and emotional panels.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for romantic pauses, fantasy wonder, quiet beauty, emotional reveals, soft closeups and panels that need graceful movement.

presets.name: Camera Noir Creep
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: slow creeping pan with restrained tilt, suited to mystery, noir and quiet dread.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for detective moments, clues, suspicious rooms, noir panels, hidden danger, mystery builds and quiet thriller beats.

presets.name: Camera Orbit Reveal
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: arcs around the panel with a controlled rotation and push, creating a reveal without overlays.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for object reveals, character turns, magical discoveries, scene reveals, dramatic panels and cinematic motion beats.

presets.name: Camera Page Glide
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: glides across a full comic page like a guided reader scan, with clean editorial framing.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for full pages, multi-panel pages, reading flow, page detail tours, classic comics and creator previews.

presets.name: Camera Micro Shake
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: controlled handheld micro-shake that adds urgency without hiding the panel.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for arguments, fear, running, pressure, unstable emotion, fight buildup and scenes that need subtle nervous energy.

presets.name: Camera Romance Drift
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: slow delicate drift for faces, hands, confessions and soft emotional beats.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for romance, confession, nostalgia, soft fantasy, emotional pause, gentle eye contact and quiet beauty shots.

presets.name: Camera Horror Creep Zoom
presets.englishDescription: Movement-only camera preset: slow creeping zoom with slight instability for dread, horror and thriller panels.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for horror buildup, dread, haunted spaces, villain hints, suspense panels, creepy closeups and slow fear reveals.

presets.name: Editorial Panel Zoom
presets.englishDescription: Camera-first editorial zoom: slow crop, matte framing, subtle motion and no decorative overlay competing with the art.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for closeups, eye moments, emotional pauses, quiet tension and dramatic holds where the original panel should carry the scene.

presets.name: Glitch Horror Signal
presets.englishDescription: Horror signal corruption: VHS tear, chromatic breakup, scanline bars, jitter camera and readable focal restoration.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for cursed footage, sci-fi corruption, monster reveals, surveillance moments and unsettling digital distortion.

presets.name: Shadow Crawl
presets.englishDescription: Slow invasive darkness that creeps from the frame edges, narrows the safe area and builds dread without cutting away.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for haunted spaces, hidden threats, cursed rooms, slow fear, stalking scenes and suspense before a reveal.
presets.spanishDescription: Sombra que invade poco a poco desde los bordes, cerrando la viñeta y creando tension sin tapar el punto importante.

presets.name: Red Strobe Dread
presets.englishDescription: Controlled red danger pulses with brief exposure flashes, dark recovery frames and violent but readable rhythm.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for alarms, bloodless danger, horror reveals, violence implied offscreen, panic beats and high-tension moments.
presets.spanishDescription: Pulsos rojos de peligro con flashes cortos y recuperacion oscura; intenso, pero sin convertir la imagen en una mancha roja.

presets.name: Ink Bleed Omen
presets.englishDescription: Black ink bleed and paper stains spread across the panel like a cursed manga page, revealing dread through texture.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for cursed pages, occult panels, psychological dread, manga horror, written warnings and supernatural contamination.
presets.spanishDescription: Tinta negra que sangra por la pagina como una maldicion; ideal para terror manga, avisos, ocultismo y tension psicologica.

presets.name: Jumpscare Snap
presets.englishDescription: Abrupt shock beat: micro-freeze, punch-in, exposure flash, frame tear and immediate dark hold on the same panel.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for sudden monster reveals, scary faces, loud moments, final scares and reels that need one sharp horror hit.
presets.spanishDescription: Golpe seco de susto: micro pausa, acercamiento brusco, flash, rotura de frame y retencion oscura en la misma viñeta.

presets.name: VHS Possession
presets.englishDescription: Analog possession look with tracking lines, RGB drift, dirty tape noise and unstable frame breathing.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for found footage, haunted screens, cursed video, analog horror, surveillance scenes and corrupted memories.
presets.spanishDescription: Estetica VHS maldita: tracking, ruido de cinta, desplazamiento RGB y respiracion inestable de la imagen.

presets.name: Eye Panic Push
presets.englishDescription: Claustrophobic detail push toward an eye, face, clue or shadow with nervous focus, vignette and tiny panic tremor.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for eyes, hidden clues, suspicious expressions, silent realization, stalker presence and psychological thriller beats.
presets.spanishDescription: Acercamiento claustrofobico a un ojo, pista, cara o sombra con viñeta oscura y temblor nervioso muy controlado.

presets.name: Blackout Breath
presets.englishDescription: Darkness breathes over the panel in slow pulses, almost hiding the image before letting it return.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for quiet dread, darkness, nightmares, someone watching, power cuts, haunted rooms and suspense pauses.
presets.spanishDescription: Oscuridad que respira sobre la viñeta: casi oculta la escena y vuelve a soltarla, perfecto para miedo lento.

presets.name: Cursed Symbol Reveal
presets.englishDescription: Occult symbol or warning shape emerges with scratches, red edge light and unstable ritual glow.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for curses, rituals, haunted objects, supernatural reveals, forbidden symbols and demonic hints.
presets.spanishDescription: Simbolo maldito que aparece con arañazos, borde rojo y brillo inestable; para rituales, objetos encantados y revelaciones sobrenaturales.

presets.name: Monster Silhouette
presets.englishDescription: A dark silhouette pressure effect: background dims, monster shape or presence reads as a looming reveal.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for monster entrances, villain reveals, figures in doorways, creature shadows and ominous final panels.
presets.spanishDescription: Presion de silueta: el fondo baja, aparece una presencia oscura y la escena sugiere monstruo o villano sin explicarlo todo.

presets.name: Chase Pulse
presets.englishDescription: Thriller chase pressure with rhythmic shutters, diagonal pursuit streaks, nervous camera pulse and dark urban tension.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for pursuits, escapes, running scenes, criminals being followed, city danger and high-pressure thriller beats.
presets.spanishDescription: Pulso de persecucion: cortes de luz, diagonales de huida, tension urbana y ritmo nervioso sin convertirlo en manga de accion.

presets.name: Surveillance Scan
presets.englishDescription: Cold surveillance overlay with camera scan, timestamp feeling, tracking boxes and paranoid monitoring tension.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for security cameras, someone being watched, hidden surveillance, tracking suspects and conspiracy thriller panels.
presets.spanishDescription: Escaneo de vigilancia frio: cajas de seguimiento, sensacion de camara de seguridad y paranoia de estar siendo observado.

presets.name: Evidence Pinboard
presets.englishDescription: Investigation montage overlay with paper edges, red thread paths, clue flashes and detective-board composition.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for case reveals, clue connections, murder boards, conspiracies, investigations and detective thriller reels.
presets.spanishDescription: Mapa de investigacion: hilos rojos, bordes de papel, destellos de pistas y composicion de tablero detectivesco.

presets.name: Crosshair Lock
presets.englishDescription: Targeting pressure with hard corner marks, lens drift, crosshair lock and restrained tactical danger.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for assassins, threats, someone being targeted, tactical scenes, snipers and crime thriller reveals.
presets.spanishDescription: Bloqueo de objetivo con marcas tacticas, deriva de lente y amenaza contenida; para asesinos, vigilancia o peligro inmediato.

presets.name: Knife Edge Light
presets.englishDescription: Sharp sliver of dangerous light cuts through darkness like a blade, with metallic glints and crime-thriller restraint.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for weapons, threats, tense confrontations, crime scenes, slasher-lite moments and dangerous reveals.
presets.spanishDescription: Rendija de luz afilada como una cuchilla, con brillos metalicos y tension de thriller criminal sin caer en gore.

presets.name: Phone Signal Trace
presets.englishDescription: Modern phone-trace visual with signal rings, map-like ticks, glitching contact lines and urgent investigation mood.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for missing persons, phone calls, tracked locations, digital clues, kidnappings and modern mystery thrillers.
presets.spanishDescription: Rastro de señal telefonica: anillos, ticks de mapa, lineas de contacto y urgencia de investigacion moderna.

presets.name: Countdown Pressure
presets.englishDescription: Deadline pressure with ticking bars, shutter flashes, frame squeeze and urgent trailer-style countdown tension.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for deadlines, bombs, races against time, escape scenes, last chances and high-stakes thriller climaxes.
presets.spanishDescription: Presion de cuenta atras: barras de tiempo, flashes de obturador, encierro del encuadre y urgencia de climax.

presets.name: Interrogation Lamp
presets.englishDescription: Harsh interrogation lamp with swinging light cone, hard shadows, cigarette-room noir mood and pressure on faces.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for interrogations, confessions, suspects, police rooms, morally tense dialogue and noir thriller panels.
presets.spanishDescription: Lampara de interrogatorio: cono de luz duro, sombras marcadas y presion noir sobre caras o confesiones.

presets.name: City Noir Pursuit
presets.englishDescription: Noir city pursuit look with rain streaks, streetlight bands, dark frame pressure and urban crime energy.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for alleys, city chases, detective pursuit, rainy streets, fugitives and urban thriller atmospheres.
presets.spanishDescription: Persecucion noir urbana: lluvia, bandas de farola, encuadre oscuro y energia de calle criminal.

presets.name: Identity Fracture
presets.englishDescription: Psychological split identity effect with fractured glass slices, offset faces and unstable memory reveal.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for identity twists, unreliable narrators, psychological reveals, memory breaks and character suspicion.
presets.spanishDescription: Fractura psicologica: cortes de cristal, caras desfasadas y revelacion inestable de identidad o memoria.

presets.name: Slow Door Creak
presets.englishDescription: Slow doorway suspense with narrow light leak, edge shadow movement and a held reveal without a jump.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for doors opening, someone entering, hidden rooms, quiet fear and slow anticipation before a reveal.
presets.spanishDescription: Puerta abriendose despacio: rendija de luz, sombra lateral y espera tensa sin susto inmediato.

presets.name: Held Breath Vignette
presets.englishDescription: Almost-still suspense hold with breathing edge pressure, subtle exposure dips and a tense quiet frame.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for silent pauses, characters hiding, listening moments, dread holds and scenes where nothing should happen yet.
presets.spanishDescription: Suspense casi inmovil: bordes que respiran, pequeñas bajadas de luz y un silencio visual que aguanta la tension.

presets.name: Hidden Clue Glint
presets.englishDescription: Tiny clue highlight with one restrained glint, soft local contrast and careful viewer attention control.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for hidden objects, keys, notes, suspicious details, clues in a room and mystery reveals.
presets.spanishDescription: Destello minimo de pista: sube el contraste local y guia el ojo hacia un detalle sin romper la escena.

presets.name: Footstep Ripple
presets.englishDescription: Approaching footstep tension with floor ripples, low shadow beats and subtle audio-like visual pulse.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for footsteps, someone approaching, hallway tension, stalking, hiding and unseen danger getting closer.
presets.spanishDescription: Pasos acercandose: ondas bajas en el suelo, golpes de sombra y pulso visual sutil de peligro cercano.

presets.name: Curtain Shadow
presets.englishDescription: Soft moving curtain or blind shadows cross the panel, creating uncertainty and hidden-presence tension.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for windows, rooms, someone hiding, private spaces, nighttime interiors and uncertainty before a reveal.
presets.spanishDescription: Sombras de cortina o persiana cruzan la viñeta: intimidad, duda y presencia oculta sin mostrarla aun.

presets.name: Silence Drop
presets.englishDescription: A sudden visual hush: color drains, motion nearly stops, edges close in and the panel holds uncomfortably.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for tense pauses, a sound stopping, someone realizing danger, quiet rooms and before a reveal lands.
presets.spanishDescription: Silencio visual: baja el color, casi se detiene el movimiento y los bordes aprietan la viñeta de forma incomoda.

presets.name: Peek Through Crack
presets.englishDescription: Narrow cracked-view mask that reveals only a slice of the panel, like watching through a door gap or broken wall.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for spying, hiding, peeking through doors, partial reveals, stalking and voyeuristic suspense moments.
presets.spanishDescription: Vista por una grieta: solo una parte de la viñeta queda visible, como mirar por una puerta o pared rota.

presets.name: Clock Tension
presets.englishDescription: Waiting tension with clock-hand sweeps, tiny repeated ticks and gradually tightening frame pressure.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for waiting, deadlines without action, appointments, traps, delayed reveals and time-based suspense.
presets.spanishDescription: Tension de espera: agujas, pequeños ticks repetidos y encuadre que se cierra poco a poco.

presets.name: Dust In Light
presets.englishDescription: Cinematic dust motes in a narrow light shaft, with stillness, age and the feeling of something about to happen.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for empty rooms, old houses, quiet discoveries, abandoned spaces, calm before danger and atmospheric suspense.
presets.spanishDescription: Particulas de polvo en un haz de luz estrecho: quietud, espacio viejo y sensacion de que algo va a pasar.

presets.name: Unseen Watcher
presets.englishDescription: Subtle watcher presence with off-frame shadow pressure, asymmetric vignette and one suspicious edge movement.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for being watched, stalkers, someone outside the frame, paranoia, unseen danger and quiet threat.
presets.spanishDescription: Presencia fuera de campo: sombra asimetrica, presion lateral y un movimiento minimo que sugiere que alguien mira.

presets.name: Fog Bank
presets.englishDescription: Dense cinematic fog rolls across the active panel with layered smoke, cold grading and soft obscured depth.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for haunted streets, forests, abandoned rooms, mystery entrances, supernatural reveals and panels that need atmosphere.
presets.spanishDescription: Niebla densa cinematografica: capas de humo frio cruzan la viñeta, tapan parte de la imagen y dan profundidad inquietante.

presets.name: Blood Drop Omen
presets.englishDescription: Stylized blood drops slide across the foreground with red lens stain, small trails and ominous crime-horror pressure.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for danger, murders, threats, injuries implied offscreen, horror warnings and crime scenes without explicit gore.
presets.spanishDescription: Gotas de sangre estilizadas: manchas y rastros rojos en primer plano para amenaza, crimen o terror sin gore explicito.

presets.name: Toxic Ooze Omen
presets.englishDescription: Viscous toxic ooze crawls over the lens with green vapor, bubbles, chemical glow and contamination pressure.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for poison, infection, cursed laboratories, mutant horror, toxic monsters, plague scenes and sci-fi contamination.
presets.spanishDescription: Viscosidad toxica: gotas verdes, burbujas, vapor quimico y brillo contaminado en primer plano para veneno, plaga o laboratorio maldito.

presets.name: Hellfire Ash Omen
presets.englishDescription: Dark fantasy hellfire glow with ember rain, burning edge haze, ash particles and infernal heat over the active panel.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for demons, cursed portals, infernal fantasy, fire magic, apocalypse beats, monsters and dark fantasy threats.
presets.spanishDescription: Infierno y ceniza: brasas, humo caliente, bordes quemados y resplandor naranja para demonios, portales, magia oscura o amenaza final.

presets.name: Bullet Impact Glass
presets.englishDescription: Bullet-hit glass overlay with a sharp impact point, branching cracks, flying shards, dust and a cold action flash.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for gunshots, assassination beats, action-thriller impacts, car windows, interrogation danger and violent reveals without gore.
presets.spanishDescription: Disparo sobre cristal: punto de impacto, grietas ramificadas, fragmentos y flash frio para thriller, accion o asesinato sugerido.

presets.name: Black Ink Curse
presets.englishDescription: Black ink curse overlay with crawling brush strokes, drips, splatter, paper-white edge highlights and manga-horror pressure.

presets.englishDescription: Distressed horror warning text: ink texture, rough contrast and controlled readability.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for cursed warnings, scary narration, dread beats and short horror captions.

presets.name: Sci-Fi HUD Caption
presets.englishDescription: Futuristic HUD caption with scan brackets, compact technical framing and glow accents.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for analysis, clues, mecha, space, cyberpunk, detective-tech and tactical narration.

presets.name: Romance Letter Card
presets.englishDescription: Soft romance/fantasy narration card with warm backing, gentle contrast and emotional pacing.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for confession, inner narration, romantic pauses, soft fantasy moments and emotional reveals.

presets.name: Speed Wipe Pro
presets.englishDescription: Directional speed wipe with tapered streaks, motion blur feeling and beat-friendly panel replacement.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use between action panels, chase beats, punches, attacks and fast reveals.

presets.name: Impact Smash Cut
presets.englishDescription: Hard hit transition with flash, camera shake, impact burst and panel B slam-in.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use for shock cuts, fight beats, jump moments, page-turn surprises and strong impact reveals.

presets.name: Page Flip Pro
presets.englishDescription: Physical comic page turn with fold highlight, paper shadow, perspective motion and panel replacement.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use when the reel should feel like turning a comic page, starting a chapter or moving between story beats.

presets.name: Glitch Tear
presets.englishDescription: Digital tear transition with RGB bands, corrupted row masks, scanline flicker and abrupt replacement.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use between horror, sci-fi, surveillance, corrupted memory and monster reveal panels.

presets.name: Vertical Scroll Cut
presets.englishDescription: Mobile reading transition where panel A scrolls out and panel B enters through a vertical webtoon gutter.
presets.aiSelectorDescription: Use between webtoon/manhwa panels, tall page moments and mobile-native story flow.

textAnimations.name: Rise & Lock
textAnimations.englishDescription: Smooth upward entrance, steady hold and soft fade for readable captions.
textAnimations.aiSelectorDescription: Use for standard readable captions and narration.

textAnimations.name: Impact Slam
textAnimations.englishDescription: Fast overshoot, squash, micro-shake and quick settle for action words.
textAnimations.aiSelectorDescription: Use for impact SFX, strong hooks, fight beats and shock words.

textAnimations.name: Glitch Type-In
textAnimations.englishDescription: Character reveal with flicker, digital jitter and brief RGB disturbance.
textAnimations.aiSelectorDescription: Use for horror, sci-fi, terminal captions and corrupted messages.

textAnimations.name: Mask Swipe Reveal
textAnimations.englishDescription: Text appears through a moving mask and subtle light sweep.
textAnimations.aiSelectorDescription: Use for titles, chapter cards and polished reveals.

textAnimations.name: Soft Breathe
textAnimations.englishDescription: Gentle opacity and scale breathing for emotional or romantic captions.
textAnimations.aiSelectorDescription: Use for quiet emotion, romance, fantasy calm and slow reveals.
